name: Kyukimon

signature_move.name: Blade Twister
signature_move.description: Creates a tornado around the enemy, and minces them with vacuum blades.

description: A Bewitching Beast Digimon with an appearance resembling the " Kamaitachi ", a legendary yōkai . The hairs that cover it from head to toe indiscriminately tear anything in its surroundings to pieces with their sharp edges, so it is truly a deadly weapon-like bladed beast. It is also fast, tearing its whole body to shreds as it raises a whirlwind. Its Special Moves are creating a tornado around the enemy, and mincing them with vacuum blades ( Blade Twister ), and shooting diamond-shaped seals from its brow ( Sanrensei ).
